temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man sitting in what appears to be the passenger seat of a car. He is wearing a black t-shirt and is visibly distressed, with sweat glistening on his face. His expression is one of intense concern and urgency as he speaks, his mouth open and his eyes wide. Another person's face is partially visible on the right, listening intently. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention on the emotional exchange between the two individuals. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a light color. The camera remains steady, capturing the raw emotion of the man's face. A man speaks in a strained, urgent voice, his words coming out in a rapid, breathless rush. His tone is filled with anxiety and concern as he says, "他做事不专心，又看着你的话..." (He's not focused when he does things, and if he sees you again...). The audio is quiet, with no background music or other sound effects, making his distressed voice the central focus.
